Petition To Compel Account From Personal Representative, To Compel Conveyance Or Transfer Of Property Pursuant To The Estate Bank Account; For An Order For Distribution To Surcharge Personal Representative For Interest On Amount To Be Distributed And For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Status Report On Condition Of Estate Of Adoree Troche; For Amendment To Decree Of Final Distribution Of Estate Of Adoree Troche And To Remove John Troche As Personal Representative Of The Estate Of Adoree Troche
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Swendsen appeared by zoom for John Troche (Personal Representative).
Brian Connors appeared by zoom for Michael Ramos (Personal Representative of the Estate of Kenneth Troche).

Mr. Swendsen stated that they came to an agreement, that they signed off on the letter and that Mr. Connors will be presenting it to the Court for signature. Mr. Connors stated that Mr. Troche is to provide a status report by May 1st regarding sale of the Hawaii property, that Mr. Troche is to provide a status report for every month after May 1st that the property is not sold, and that they are asking for a correction in the order for final distribution to indicate that all residue in the estate of Adoree be distributed to Kenneth's estate. The Court informed Counsel that it will not be supervising anything that is in the Hawaii Court, that the Hawaii estate has always been its own case and that it is not inclined to amend an order from six and a half years ago. The Court also stated that the Personal Representative can continue to marshal assets and that it does not know why they need the amend the order when authority is already there. Mr. Connors stated that it's an ancillary proceeding, that there has never been a discharge, that San Francisco is the only Court to have issued letters with authority which allows John to sell the Hawaii property, and that those assets will have to go into Adoree's estate and then be distributed into Kenneth's estate. The Court stated that Hawaii has its own procedures, that it is not appropriate for this Court to tell the Hawaii Court what to do, and that it is not inclined to take an active role in supervising what is going on in Hawaii, but it will take a look at it. The Petition for Status Report on Condition of Estate of Adoree Troche. etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
